# rt_graphic_critique

**Task:** Graphic Critique

## Route fit
- Role: governing
- Lightweight eligible: yes
- Governing route or helper: governing route

## Use when
- Use when the key problem is focal structure, type/image balance, or distance legibility.

## Startup recommendation
- Recommended mode: lightweight
- Default contract: `dist/runtime/contracts_lite/graphic_critique.md`
- Recommended profile if you escalate: `dist/DEPLOY_BRAND.md`
- Visual input supported: yes

## Governing skills
- `dist/runtime/skills/graphic-design-expert.md` - Use this skill for posters, campaigns, editorial composition, presentation slides, image/text balance, visual hierarchy, and distance-driven communication when the output is more graphic-communication-driven than product-UI-driven.
- `dist/runtime/skills/type-system-expert.md` - Use this skill to choose, compare, pair, substitute, and deploy typefaces intelligently across UI, editorial, brand, dashboards, presentations, print, accessibility-sensitive, and multilingual systems.

## Optional supporting skills
- `dist/runtime/skills/brand-strategy-expert.md` - Use this skill to make strict positioning, audience-fit, trust-signal, convention, and brand-vs-interface decisions. Treat brand work as a system of falsifiable hypotheses, not a moodboard.
- `dist/runtime/skills/color-system-expert.md` - Use this skill to build or evaluate palettes by semantic role, domain fit, contrast, dark-mode behavior, state logic, data-vis safety, and print awareness.

## Runtime summaries
- `dist/runtime/summaries/graphic-design-format-summary.md`
- `dist/runtime/summaries/typography-summary.md`
- `dist/runtime/summaries/typeface-database-summary.md`
- `dist/runtime/summaries/audience-and-industry-summary.md`
- `dist/runtime/summaries/color-and-accessibility-summary.md`

## Contract shape
- Communication goal
- Composition failures
- Rebuild moves
- Distance and emphasis tradeoff

## Escalate when
- runtime summary lacks measurable thresholds
- validator flags insufficient evidence
- high-stakes or standards-grade task
- user explicitly requests deeper source synthesis
- route conflict or canonical ambiguity appears

## Fallback
- Route fallback: `rt_brand_positioning`
- Canonical routing fallback: `src/schemas/routing_registry.json`
